stack: Static HTML + CSS + vanilla JS, Cloudflare Pages (no build step)

commands.install: npm install --no-save --prefix {dir} playwright@1.49.1 && npx --prefix {dir} playwright install chromium

proposal.focus: Polish and features for the floor-plan sketcher — the drawing/snapping UX, live area/perimeter, furniture + clearance checks, and the PNG/SVG/URL-hash share artifacts. Client-side only in v1, no backend, deploy cheap.
